blended.narrative: Lookout Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,999 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
